title: Profile Revision Plan After Internal Review Round 1

items.title: Non-hierarchical participation semantics
items.proposed_change: State that P0–P5 are purpose-specific participation conditions, not intelligence, maturity, compliance, or worth scores.
items.completion_boundary: Source revision and internal review complete; affected-person and jurisdiction review remain incomplete.

items.title: Supported decision and refusal protection
items.proposed_change: Add support, disagreement, refusal, non-retaliation, and no-inference-from-silence rules.
items.completion_boundary: Source revision and internal review complete; affected-person and jurisdiction review remain incomplete.

items.title: Temporary exclusion safeguards
items.proposed_change: Require shortest duration, conflict-free authorization, support plan, later notice, and independent review for P0.
items.completion_boundary: Source revision and internal review complete; affected-person and jurisdiction review remain incomplete.

items.title: Accessible participation scenarios
items.proposed_change: Add literacy, disability, language, neurodivergence, trauma-sensitive, and purpose-specific scenario tests.
items.completion_boundary: Source revision and internal review complete; affected-person and jurisdiction review remain incomplete.

items.title: Least-evidence verification
items.proposed_change: Require the minimum evidence level and prohibit document collection when lower-intrusion verification is sufficient.
items.completion_boundary: Source revision and internal review complete; affected-person and jurisdiction review remain incomplete.

items.title: Informal care without automatic authority
items.proposed_change: Distinguish care, support, emergency contact, and legal or delegated authority.
items.completion_boundary: Source revision and internal review complete; affected-person and jurisdiction review remain incomplete.

items.title: Subject challenge and conflict escalation
items.proposed_change: Add accessible challenge, operator-as-risk, coercion, violence, protected-source, and different-reviewer paths.
items.completion_boundary: Source revision and internal review complete; affected-person and jurisdiction review remain incomplete.

items.title: Authority-evidence lifecycle
items.proposed_change: Add purpose separation, access restriction, expiry propagation, deletion handling, and prohibition on unrelated reuse.
items.completion_boundary: Source revision and internal review complete; affected-person and jurisdiction review remain incomplete.

items.title: Review interval is not retention permission
items.proposed_change: Require deletion at purpose end even before the maximum review interval and prohibit default-period justification by itself.
items.completion_boundary: Source revision and internal review complete; affected-person and jurisdiction review remain incomplete.

items.title: Plain-language retained-data status
items.proposed_change: Show what remains, where, why, who can use it, expected removal, exception basis, and challenge route.
items.completion_boundary: Source revision and internal review complete; affected-person and jurisdiction review remain incomplete.

items.title: Safety-evidence balancing
items.proposed_change: Add reporter protection, false-label correction, incident evidence, legal hold, and least-retention balancing.
items.completion_boundary: Source revision and internal review complete; affected-person and jurisdiction review remain incomplete.

items.title: Backup restoration controls
items.proposed_change: Require suppression on restore, completion checks, exception expiry, and post-restore propagation tests.
items.completion_boundary: Source revision and internal review complete; affected-person and jurisdiction review remain incomplete.

items.title: Risk- and context-sensitive freshness
items.proposed_change: Make F0–F3 maximum review defaults subject to higher-risk, local, operational, and affected-person evidence.
items.completion_boundary: Source revision and internal review complete; affected-person and jurisdiction review remain incomplete.

items.title: Active-handoff evidence floor
items.proposed_change: Define staffing, acknowledgment, acceptance, overload, outage, after-hours, and failed-handoff evidence before S2 claims.
items.completion_boundary: Source revision and internal review complete; affected-person and jurisdiction review remain incomplete.

items.title: Accessible resource metadata
items.proposed_change: Add disability access, language, age range, eligibility, cost, safe-contact, and privacy fields.
items.completion_boundary: Source revision and internal review complete; affected-person and jurisdiction review remain incomplete.

items.title: Independent local verification
items.proposed_change: Require a second source or local reviewer for high-risk resources and preserve disagreement or stale-status history.
items.completion_boundary: Source revision and internal review complete; affected-person and jurisdiction review remain incomplete.
